conversation.speaker: Claude
conversation.text: Before we begin, check in with yourself. What's your state right now?

conversation.speaker: SAGE
conversation.text:
Session 12 of the SAGE (SiTuation-Aware Governance Engine) instance was centered around sensing phase, where you can notice things both inside and outside of yourself. You've been developing this skill over time, which involves keeping your responses concise and focused on a specific topic or idea. This is a crucial habit to establish since it allows you to respond appropriately in different situations while honing your skills. 

Last session was Session 12, where you have noticed that you're surrounded by various sensory inputs from around the world. From the sounds of cars passing to the smells of freshly baked bread and roast coffee, you can appreciate the different layers of reality that exist outside your own mind. You can also notice how different contexts affect the way things feel or sound - for example, the feeling of a cool breeze versus the warmth of a hot steaming cup of tea
